name: Chilled Cantaloupe Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the seeds from the melon.
2. Cube the pulp of the cantaloupe.
3. Place the cubed pulp and cinnamon into a blender.
4. Puree the mixture in the blender.
5. In a separate container, combine the orange juice and lime juice.
6. Stir the citrus juices into the puree.
7. Chill the soup mixture.
8. Serve the chilled soup in individual bowls.
9. Garnish with fresh mint sprigs.
10. Allow the soup to chill for at least 2 hours before serving.
